display.purpose: Hero h1, section h2, outro, big dossier numbers.

headline.purpose: Card titles — coach name, offer title, feature title.

body.purpose: Bios, blurbs, FAQ answers. Weight 300 default.

label.purpose: Kickers, stat labels, button text, nav links, captions. Uppercase, 0.22em tracking.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Booking modal + lightbox — the only large shadows.

shadows.name: cutout
shadows.purpose: Poster cutout PNGs — physical weight against the void.

shadows.name: cover-stack
shadows.purpose: Lead-magnet cover layered shadow + ring. Signature.

motion.name: ease-quint
motion.purpose: Default easing — state transitions, hover lifts.

motion.name: ease-expo
motion.purpose: Entrance reveals, drawer deploy, menu animations.

motion.name: hud-slide-up
motion.value: from { opacity:0; transform: translate3d(0,42px,0) skewY(1.5deg) } to { opacity:1; transform: none }
motion.purpose: Scroll-reveal entrance for cards, stats, sections. 820ms ease-expo.

motion.name: hud-clip-x
motion.value: from { opacity:0; clip-path: inset(0 100% 0 0) } to { opacity:1; clip-path: inset(0 0 0 0) }
motion.purpose: Left-to-right wipe reveal for section headers.

motion.name: count-up
motion.value: rAF + easeOutExpo over 1200ms, ghost span reserves final box
motion.purpose: Dossier stat numbers count 0→value on scroll-in. No CLS.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The CTA. Signal Red, sharp corners, mono uppercase. Hover lifts + red glow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6em; padding: 14px 22px; background: #ff4655; color: #fff; border: 1px solid #ff4655; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.74rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.22em; transition: all 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #d22a3c; border-color: #d22a3c; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(255,70,85,0.35); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ff4655; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary CTA. Transparent, hairline border, ink text. Hover: border + text go red.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6em; padding: 14px 22px; background: transparent; color: #ece4d8; border: 1px solid rgba(236,228,216,0.22); border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.74rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.22em; transition: all 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #ff4655; color: #ff4655; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ff4655; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: HUD Panel
components.description: Tactical data container. 2px radius, hairline border, four Signal Red L-bracket corners.
components.html:
VCL LATAM SUR
2°
components.css: .ds-hud { position: relative; background: #0c0c0d; border: 1px solid rgba(236,228,216,0.08); border-radius: 2px; padding: 40px 32px; } .ds-hud-br-tl, .ds-hud-br-tr, .ds-hud-br-bl, .ds-hud-br-br { position: absolute; width: 14px; height: 14px; border: 1.5px solid #ff4655; } .ds-hud-br-tl { top: -1px; left: -1px; border-right: 0; border-bottom: 0; } .ds-hud-br-tr { top: -1px; right: -1px; border-left: 0; border-bottom: 0; } .ds-hud-br-bl { bottom: -1px; left: -1px; border-right: 0; border-top: 0; } .ds-hud-br-br { bottom: -1px; right: -1px; border-left: 0; border-top: 0; } .ds-hud-label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #ff4655; } .ds-hud-value { font-family: 'Tomorrow', sans-serif; font-weight: 200; font-size: clamp(4rem,7vw,6.4rem); letter-spacing: -0.06em; line-height: 0.95; color: #ece4d8; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Offer Card
components.description: Sharp-cornered card, panel bg + faint top red wash, hairline border. Featured variant: red border + stronger wash.
components.html:
BEST SELLER

Clase 1 a 1

Revisamos tu juego frame por frame.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; padding: 28px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,70,85,0.04) 0%, transparent 30%), #0c0c0d; border: 1px solid rgba(236,228,216,0.08); border-radius: 0; transition: border-color 240ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform 240ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-card:hover { border-color: rgba(236,228,216,0.22); transform: translateY(-3px); } .ds-card--featured { border-color: #ff4655; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,70,85,0.12) 0%, transparent 35%), #0c0c0d; } .ds-card-top { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-card-badge { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.58rem; letter-spacing: 0.24em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #fff; padding: 5px 10px; background: #ff4655; border: 1px solid #ff4655; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Tomorrow', sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 1.6rem; letter-spacing: -0.025em; color: #ece4d8; margin: 0; } .ds-card-blurb { color: rgba(236,228,216,0.62); font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }

components.name: Mono Input
components.description: Deep-void bg at 0.7 opacity, hairline border, mono 16px. Focus: border goes red + focus-visible ring. 16px floor stops iOS zoom.
components.css: .ds-input { background: rgba(5,5,5,0.7); border: 1px solid rgba(236,228,216,0.22); border-radius: 0; color: #ece4d8; padding: 16px 18px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 16px; outline: none; width: 100%; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(236,228,216,0.58); letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.74rem; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #ff4655; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ff4655; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Desktop nav link. Mono uppercase, Ink Dim → Signal Red on hover.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(236,228,216,0.62); text-decoration: none; transition: color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #ff4655; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ff4655; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview:
This system borrows the visual language of the Valorant esports broadcast — the HUD graphics players already trust during a VCT stream — and pulls it over an editorial fight-card structure. The audience lives inside this aesthetic every time they watch a match; using it on a coaching site signals 'we live in your world' before a single word is read. The deep-void background is not a dark-mode convenience, it is the canvas the broadcast paints on. Valorant Signal Red is the only saturated color; it is rare, loud, and carries every call to action.

The density is atmospheric, not decorative. Scan lines, L-bracket corners, mono micro-labels, ember fields, and tactical chevrons are the texture of the arena. They sit at low opacity and never compete with information. The information design itself is minimal: one headline, one kicker, one body line, one CTA per section. The fight-card editorial structure (tale-of-the-tape hero, poster-style coach cards, dossier stats with tabular numerals) gives the page the feel of a weigh-in program, not a SaaS landing.

This system explicitly rejects: the 2026 cream/sand warm-neutral editorial default; generic SaaS coaching landings; gamer pastiche; faceless booster-site vibes; corporate e-learning sterility; glassmorphism as default; gradient text; the hero-metric template; identical card grids; numbered scaffolding markers on every section; side-stripe accent borders.
keyCharacteristics: Deep-void canvas (#050505) with warm-bone ink (#ece4d8) — never pure white on pure black.
One saturated accent (Valorant Signal Red #ff4655), used on ≤10% of any screen.
Four-font system: Tomorrow (display), DM Sans (body), JetBrains Mono (labels), Chakra Petch italic (red emphasis).
Sharp corners (0 radius) everywhere except HUD panels (2px) and status dots (50%).
Motion is gated behind prefers-reduced-motion with a no-JS fallback — non-negotiable.
Every credibility claim lands with evidence on the same screen.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Signal Red is used on ≤10% of any screen. If two red elements compete, one is wrong. Red is the CTA color, the kicker color, and the accent-italic color — it is not a fill, a background, or a gradient body.

rules.name: The No-Cream Rule
rules.body: The body background is the deep void. Never warm-tint the background toward cream, sand, paper, or parchment. Warmth lives in the ink and the ember-black gradient endpoints, never in the canvas.

rules.name: The Mono-Label Rule
rules.body: Every section has a JetBrains Mono uppercase kicker in Signal Red. It carries the section's real name, not a generic 'ABOUT' or 'PROCESS'. The kicker is voice; an ordinal number above it is grammar and is prohibited.

rules.name: The 65ch Rule
rules.body: Body line length caps at 44–50ch (the blurbs are intentionally narrow). Never let a body block exceed 75ch. The editorial narrowness is the point.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. A shadow at rest means the element is modally elevated (dialog, lightbox) or it is wrong. Cards use hairline borders + tonal panel bg, not shadows.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: Borders are 1px and low-opacity (--val-rule 0.08, --val-rule-hot 0.22). Never a 2px+ solid border as a frame. The only thick borders are the 1.5px Signal Red L-brackets on HUD panels, and those are corner accents, not frames.

dos: Do use Valorant Signal Red (#ff4655) on ≤10% of any screen — CTAs, one kicker per section, the accent-italic word, HUD L-brackets.
Do use the four-font system on its contrast axis: Tomorrow (display) + DM Sans (body) + JetBrains Mono (labels) + Chakra Petch italic (red emphasis).
Do cap body line length at 44–50ch; the editorial narrowness is the point.
Do gate every animation behind prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference with a <noscript> fallback that forces reveal content visible.
Do trap focus in every dialog (booking modal, lightbox, nav drawer) — move focus in on open, wrap Tab, restore to the trigger on close.
Do pair status dots (red/amber/green) with a text label — never color-only.
Do back every credibility claim with evidence on the same screen (team logos, stats, result screenshots).
Do use next/image for the large coach PNGs — they are the LCP and benefit most from avif/webp + responsive srcset.
donts: Don't warm-tint the body background toward cream, sand, paper, or parchment. The canvas is the deep void.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient. Emphasis is via weight, size, or the Chakra Petch red italic — never gradient text.
Don't use backdrop-filter blur as default decoration. The only glass is the sticky nav when scrolled.
Don't ship the hero-metric template. Stats live in the dossier section.
Don't put a numbered ordinal marker (01/02/03) above every section. The red mono kicker is the section marker.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe. Use a full hairline border, a leading dot, or a tint background.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing. ease-out-quint and ease-out-expo only.
Don't use pure #fff for body text. Body text is Warm Bone #ece4d8.
Don't animate width, height, top, left, or margin. Use transform and opacity.
Don't ship an animation that doesn't degrade for reduced motion or no-JS.
Don't sound like a marketer. The voice is 'cero humo' — a Radiant IGL briefing a teammate.
